prompt: Ultra-realistic editorial food photography of a rustic artisan sourdough loaf freshly baked, placed on a weathered wooden baker's board dusted with rye flour. The bread has a deep mahogany crust with dramatic crackled scoring patterns revealing a golden-amber interior crumb. Small clouds of flour dust hang in the air. Warm morning light streams in from the left through a farmhouse window, casting long soft shadows across the wooden surface. 90mm macro lens, f/2.8, ISO 160, natural warm daylight. Documentary food realism. The setting evokes a traditional Swiss-German bakery from 1860. Visible flour particles, rough wood grain texture, slight steam rising from the crust. No artificial lighting, no styling tricks, no prop-heavy composition. Raw artisanal honesty.
negative_prompt: plastic, CGI, cartoon, oversaturated, studio lighting, artificial, stock photo generic, clean background, white background, modern industrial bakery, no texture, overexposed, blurry, low quality, extra objects, watermark

settings.lighting: natural morning window light, warm golden hour, soft shadows
settings.depth_of_field: shallow, sharp on crust details, soft background
settings.quality: ultra high detail, visible flour dust, natural imperfections
